clues.clueText: What a cashier does to each item at checkout
Nail a test with a perfect score
Fatty tuna belly in sushi, or a bull in Spanish
pH below 7, or a psychedelic drug
"The needs of the many outweigh the needs of the ___"
Comic book sound effect for a punch
Tennis serve that clips the net
Bachelor party, or a male deer
Gear tooth, or a small part of a big machine
Sheltered side from the wind, or Bruce ___
Linger on a thought, or reside
Grizzly or polar, or to endure
Tennis scoring unit, or a film's stage
